playwright.description: Browser automation — visit localhost, take screenshots, verify visual output during dev

hooks.command: powershell -Command "$file = $env:CLAUDE_FILE_PATH; if ($file -match '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$') { npx eslint $file --quiet 2>&1 } else { exit 0 }"
hooks.description: Lint changed JS/TS file after edit (WINDOWS — see HOOKS_GUIDE.md for Linux/macOS variant)
Run unit tests after task completion (WINDOWS — see HOOKS_GUIDE.md for Linux/macOS variant)

hooks.command: powershell -Command "Add-Content -Path .claude/plans/progress.md -Value \"`n### Compaction $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')`nContext window compacted. Re-read plan and progress files to restore context.\""
hooks.description: Log compaction event to progress file (forward-looking — requires Claude Code PreCompact support)
